requirements.evidence: LSCard now resolves its fill from the active theme values and has dark-theme regression coverage.
LSPanel now resolves its fill from the active theme values and has dark-theme regression coverage.
LSGlassPanel now supports a real backdrop-aware blur path through Haze when a backdrop source is provided, while retaining the API-aware fallback path.
The callout stripe renders inside the clipped glass panel bounds and retains the required 3.dp width.
Signal and warning callout accents resolve from canonical runtime theme values.
The required surface stories are registered, and the sandbox story frame provides a real backdrop source for the glass variants.
The compatibility fallback remains in place and the connected instrumentation suite passed.
No forbidden literal color/icon/font usage remains in the surface atom files.
Release assemble passed and the APK inspection gate found zero com.nativesandbox entries.

summary: Approved. The Android surface trio now uses runtime theme colors, the GlassPanel callout stripe stays inside the container bounds, and the chrome variant has a real backdrop-blur path backed by the sandbox and instrumentation coverage.
